replay_lane_order.identity_key: 12 company-source counterparty anchors before 57 contract retry

data_layers.L0_identity_anchor: project, partner, user/member identity anchors required by downstream facts
data_layers.L1_core_business_fact: provable business headers and neutral facts such as project, partner, contract header, neutral project member
data_layers.L2_business_auxiliary: optional business support fields such as notes, contacts, addresses, attachments, source text
data_layers.L3_detail_or_derived: details, lines, derived or weak historical facts after headers close
data_layers.L4_high_risk: payment, settlement, accounting, ACL and authority-sensitive facts

missing_data_policy.required_anchor_missing: block or discard; do not fabricate
missing_data_policy.ambiguous_identity: hold ledger until deterministic rule exists
